name: The Brass Vigil
specialty: The Brass Vigil are renowned for their unmatched expertise in navigating the treacherous rifts of the Undercity, often called upon for missions that require intricate knowledge of the city's ever-shifting layout.

members.name: Lysandra Ironheart
members.note: A veteran rift navigator with a mechanical prosthetic arm, a constant reminder of her narrow escape from the Tower's recent collapse.

members.name: Gavrik Ironfist
members.note: A burly, battle-hardened dwarf who always carries a maul adorned with the symbols of the Patchwork Saints, a testament to his unwavering loyalty.

members.name: Zephyr Silverwind
members.note: A silver-tongued diplomat with a penchant for enigmatic riddles, his piercing gaze often leaves those he encounters unsettled.

visual: Clad in leather armor and equipped with an array of unique, custom-made tools, they move with a practiced fluidity through the Undercity's labyrinthine streets, their identities hidden beneath stylized masks emblazoned with the symbol of the Brass Vigil.
reputation_note: Whispers circulate that the Brass Vigil's mysterious leader, Lysandra Ironheart, once worked for the Tower Authority, lending them an air of authority and a network of connections that few in the Undercity can match.
